title: neoguillauminia cleopatra
intro: Neoguillauminia cleopatra, a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, is also known as the 'Cleopatra's Needle' or 'Neoguillauminia cleopatra'. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Neoguillauminia cleopatra can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues.
